articles.title: Framework Delays Laptop 13 Pro Shipments
articles.description: Framework's Laptop 13 Pro shipments are delayed by a month due to issues with the haptic trackpad and custom display. New expected shipping is now in July.

articles.title: Ubisoft Announces Studio Closures and Layoffs
articles.description: Ubisoft has closed its Winnipeg and Belgrade studios amid a new restructuring, resulting in hundreds of layoffs. This move is part of a broader organizational change.
articles.impact: Restructuring may impact future game development.

articles.title: Intel’s Project Firefly Unveiled
articles.description: Intel's Project Firefly aims to create affordable laptops with premium features, utilizing Wildcat Lake SoCs in a sleek, ventless design. Targeting budget-conscious consumers.
articles.impact: Project Firefly could disrupt budget laptop market.

articles.title: Amazon’s Echo Speakers Aid Kids' Sleep
articles.description: Amazon introduces Sleep Studio, enhancing Echo and Echo Kids speakers to help children wind down and fall asleep with calming stories and sounds. Aimed at improving bedtime routines.

articles.title: PlayStation Plus Adds 8 Free Games
articles.description: PlayStation Plus subscribers can enjoy eight new free games this June, expanding their gaming library. Exciting titles are now available for download.
articles.impact: Enhances PlayStation Plus value for subscribers.

articles.title: Nintendo Stock Drops After Direct
articles.description: Nintendo's stock fell nearly 7% following a disappointing June Direct that lacked a new 3D Mario game, despite positive fan reactions. Investors remain cautious.

articles.title: Street Fighter 6 DLC Reveals New Characters
articles.description: Capcom reveals new details about Yasmine and Arjun, newcomers in Street Fighter 6's Season 4. Fans are excited about the latest updates.

articles.title: Deltarune Chapter 5 Release Date Announced
articles.description: Toby Fox announces the release date for Deltarune Chapter 5 and provides updates on Chapter 6, exciting fans of the series. Anticipation builds for the next installment.
articles.impact: Boosts excitement for the Deltarune series.

articles.title: EU Responds to Apple's Siri AI Decision
articles.description: The European Commission states that Apple's choice not to launch Siri AI in Europe is solely Apple's decision, clarifying its stance on the matter. Apple sought legal exemptions.
articles.impact: Highlights Apple's control over AI deployment.
